agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms & Condition
demoAccessDesc: Log in with admin@merigaumata.com or manager@merigaumata.com to explore administrative layouts. Any other logins or signups default to Customer role.
resetYourPasswordDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password.
resetEmailSent: Reset email sent! Please check your inbox to continue.
magicLinkSentDesc: A secure magic link has been sent to {email}. Click it to log in instantly.
coverDesc: Pure Vedic nutrition, organic farm goodness, and sponsored cow welfare, delivered directly from our sanctuaries to your household.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms and Conditions to proceed.
validation.fillAllFields: Please fill in all registration fields.
validation.passwordComplexity: Password does not meet all complexity requirements.
validation.enterEmailAndPassword: Please enter both email and password.

passwordRequiredDesc: Set a password in Profile → Security before enabling Two-Factor Authentication.
enable2FASuccessDesc: Your account is now protected with Two-Factor Authentication.
disable2FASuccessDesc: Two-Factor Authentication has been turned off.
twoFactorDesc: Enforce Email-OTP verification checks upon every single login attempt to maximize protection.
profileFullySecurePrefix: Your profile is fully secure. During new login sequences, we will forward a secure one-time authorization code straight to
profileInsecureDesc: Your profile currently relies solely on single-factor auth. We strongly recommend enabling Two-Factor Authentication to block unsolicited sign-in vectors.
passwordlessInfo: Since you are logged in via a passwordless provider (Magic Link or Google), password confirmation is not required to toggle Two-Factor Authentication.
backupCodesDesc: Save these recovery codes securely. If you lose access to your primary email address, you can sign in by supplying one of these single-use fallback codes.
otpVerifyFailed: OTP verification failed. Please try again.
resolvingCredentials: Resolving your secure credentials and active session state. Please do not close this window.
sessionExpiredDesc: Your session link has expired or is invalid. Redirecting you back to the login page...
enterPasscodePrefix: Two-Factor Authentication is active. Enter the 6-digit passcode delivered to
invalidResetLinkDescription: The reset link you followed is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset link from the login page.
passwordResetSuccessDescription: Your password has been successfully updated. We are redirecting you to the sign-in page to log in.
invalidResetToken: Invalid or missing password reset token.
termsRequiredError: You must accept the Terms and Conditions to proceed.
passwordSecurityRequirements: Password does not meet all security requirements.
toastPasswordResetSuccessDesc: You can now sign in with your new password.
twoFactorTotpDesc: Protect your account with a state-of-the-art Authenticator App (TOTP) generator.
twoFactorTotpInactiveDesc: Enforce Authenticator App TOTP checks on login to maximize protection against credentials theft.
totpProfileProtectedDesc: Your profile is protected. During sign-in attempts, you must enter a 6-digit TOTP code generated by your Authenticator App.
confirmPasswordSetupDesc: Confirm your password to initiate the Authenticator App setup. A verification code will be sent to your email.
enterEmailOtpSetupDesc: We sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}. Enter it below to unlock QR registration.
scanQrCodeDesc: Scan this QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password) to link your account.
scanQrCodeWarning: Make sure to scan this QR code before proceeding. It binds the stateless security secrets to your hardware device.
confirmAppRegDesc: Enter the current 6-digit verification code generated by your Authenticator App to activate protection.
saveRecoveryCodesDesc: Save these recovery codes securely. If you lose access to your primary device, you can sign in by supplying one of these single-use recovery codes.
confirmPasswordDisableDesc: Confirm your password to request deactivation. A verification code will be sent to your email.
enterEmailOtpDisableDesc: We sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}. Enter it below to authorize deactivation.
confirmAuthenticatorPossessionDesc: Provide the current 6-digit passcode generated by your Authenticator App to fully disable two-factor authentication.
supplyBackupCodeDesc: Please supply one of your emergency recovery backup codes to regain stateless access:
totpVerificationDesc: Two-Factor Authentication is active. Enter the 6-digit passcode generated by your Authenticator App:
useBackupCodeBtn: Lost device? Use emergency backup code

errors.AUTH_001: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.AUTH_002: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in or resetting your password.
errors.AUTH_003: Your email has not been verified yet. Please check your inbox for a verification code.
errors.AUTH_004: The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.AUTH_005: The verification code you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
errors.AUTH_006: This magic link has expired. Please request a new sign-in link.
errors.AUTH_007: This magic link is invalid. Please request a new one.
errors.AUTH_008: This magic link has already been used. Please request a new one.
errors.AUTH_009: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
errors.AUTH_010: Your session is invalid. Please sign in again.
errors.AUTH_011: A security issue was detected. You have been signed out for your protection.
errors.AUTH_012: Google sign-in encountered an error. Please try again.
errors.AUTH_013: Your account has been temporarily locked. Please try again later.
errors.AUTH_014: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support.
errors.AUTH_050: We encountered an issue creating your session. Please try again.
errors.AUTH_051: A database error occurred. Please try again.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
